chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1703 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.8021/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7484/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6708/2025 (U/A) 4. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 5. For orders on CMA No.6709/2025 (Ex/A) 6. For hearing of main case 03.12.2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners ************** 1. Granted. 2&3. Dismissed being infructuous. 3. Deferred for the time being. 4. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 5. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that he would be satisfied if respondent No.2 is directed to decide the petitioners’ representation already filed under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, learned Additional Advocate General, who is present in Court in another matter, waives notice of this application and raises no objection to the aforesaid proposal. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition is disposed of with directions to respondent No.2 to decide the petitioners’ representation filed under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023, within a period of 30 days, and to submit a compliance report through the Additional Registrar of this Court for perusal. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
